name: Frame
shortDefinition: The visible image boundary and everything placed inside it.
whyItMatters: The frame decides what the viewer notices and what stays hidden.
humanShootHint: Check the edges before recording and remove anything that weakens the idea.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic frame of [subject], intentional composition, clean edges, natural light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: clean cinematic frame of [subject], one clear subject, stable composition, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: clean cinematic frame of [subject], subject enters balanced composition, stable camera, 5 seconds

name: Shot
shortDefinition: One continuous camera view used as a building block of a video.
whyItMatters: Shots are the smallest practical units you plan, shoot, generate, and edit.
humanShootHint: Give each shot one clear subject and one main action.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic shot of [subject], one clear action, natural light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: single cinematic shot of [subject], one action, stable camera, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: single cinematic shot of [subject], simple action with a clean hold, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Trying to show too many ideas

name: Scene
shortDefinition: A story moment that usually happens in one place and time.
whyItMatters: Scenes help you group shots around a clear dramatic or informational purpose.
humanShootHint: Decide the scene goal before choosing close-ups or details.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic scene of [subject], clear location, one story beat, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: short cinematic scene of [subject], one clear beat, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: short cinematic scene of [subject], location then action then hold, 5 seconds

name: Sequence
shortDefinition: A planned order of shots that creates a complete mini-story.
whyItMatters: A sequence turns separate clips into something viewers can follow.
humanShootHint: Plan context, action, detail, emotion, and support before filming.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic sequence for [subject], ordered shots, clear visual progression, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: three-beat micro sequence of [subject], context detail payoff, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: five-second micro sequence of [subject], context action detail emotional hold, 5 seconds

name: Aspect Ratio
shortDefinition: The shape of the frame, such as vertical 9:16 or widescreen 16:9.
whyItMatters: The frame shape changes composition, platform fit, and where attention sits.
humanShootHint: Choose the delivery format first, then compose for that shape.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], composed for chosen aspect ratio, clean negative space, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: cinematic [subject] composed for vertical and widescreen-safe framing, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: cinematic [subject], subject moves through a balanced frame shape, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Using one composition for every platform

name: Establishing Shot
shortDefinition: A wider shot that shows where the story happens.
whyItMatters: It gives the viewer location, mood, scale, and context before details arrive.
humanShootHint: Step back, keep the horizon clean, and let the place read before action begins.
aiPromptTemplate: wide establishing shot of [subject], clear location, cinematic natural light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: wide establishing shot of [subject], static camera, soft natural light, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: wide establishing shot of [subject], gentle hold as one small action begins, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Showing a location with no story relevance

es.name: Plano de situación
es.shortDefinition: Un plano amplio que muestra dónde ocurre la historia.
es.whyItMatters: Da al espectador ubicación, ambiente, escala y contexto antes de que lleguen los detalles.

hi.name: स्थापना शॉट
hi.shortDefinition: एक चौड़ा शॉट जो दिखाता है कि कहानी कहाँ हो रही है।
hi.whyItMatters: विवरण आने से पहले दर्शक को स्थान, माहौल, पैमाना और संदर्भ देता है।

name: Wide Shot
shortDefinition: Frames the subject with plenty of surrounding environment.
whyItMatters: It shows body language, space, and how the subject relates to the world.
humanShootHint: Back up enough to show the whole subject and meaningful surroundings.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic wide shot of [subject], full environment visible, balanced composition, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: wide shot of [subject], subject clearly placed in the environment, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: wide shot of [subject], subtle subject movement through the environment, 5 seconds

es.name: Plano general
es.shortDefinition: Encuadra al sujeto con abundante entorno alrededor.
es.whyItMatters: Muestra el lenguaje corporal, el espacio y cómo el sujeto se relaciona con el mundo.

hi.name: वाइड शॉट
hi.shortDefinition: विषय को उसके आसपास के वातावरण के साथ फ्रेम करता है।
hi.whyItMatters: शरीर की भाषा, स्थान और विषय के परिवेश से संबंध को दिखाता है।

name: Medium Shot
shortDefinition: Frames a person or subject around the waist or torso.
whyItMatters: It balances expression, gesture, and action in one readable view.
humanShootHint: Keep the subject at a comfortable distance and leave a little headroom.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic medium shot of [subject], clear action, natural expression, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: medium shot of [subject], one simple action, stable camera, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: medium shot of [subject], action starts and settles naturally, 5 seconds

name: Close-Up
shortDefinition: Frames the face or an important detail to show emotion.
whyItMatters: It directs attention to emotion, texture, or story importance.
humanShootHint: Move closer, simplify the background, and focus on the eyes or key detail.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic close-up of [subject], shallow depth of field, soft light, emotional focus, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: cinematic close-up of [subject], soft light, subtle expression change, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: cinematic close-up of [subject], slow dolly in, shallow depth of field, emotional expression, 5 seconds

es.name: Primer plano
es.shortDefinition: Encuadra el rostro o un detalle importante para mostrar emoción.
es.whyItMatters: Dirige la atención hacia la emoción, la textura o un momento clave de la historia.

hi.name: क्लोज़-अप
hi.shortDefinition: भावना दिखाने के लिए चेहरे या किसी ज़रूरी विवरण को फ्रेम करता है।
hi.whyItMatters: ध्यान को भावना, बनावट या कहानी के ज़रूरी पल पर केंद्रित करता है।

name: Extreme Close-Up
shortDefinition: Frames a tiny detail such as an eye, hand, texture, or button.
whyItMatters: It makes small details feel important and creates strong visual emphasis.
humanShootHint: Use steady support, lock focus carefully, and avoid unnecessary movement.
aiPromptTemplate: extreme close-up of [subject], precise detail, shallow depth of field, cinematic texture, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: extreme close-up of [subject], tiny detail in focus, subtle motion, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: extreme close-up of [subject], slow reveal of texture, soft light, 5 seconds

name: Eye-Level Angle
shortDefinition: Places the camera around the subject's eye height.
whyItMatters: It feels neutral, direct, and easy for beginners to understand.
humanShootHint: Raise or lower the camera until the subject feels naturally met.
aiPromptTemplate: eye-level cinematic shot of [subject], natural perspective, soft light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: eye-level shot of [subject], neutral perspective, calm expression, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: eye-level shot of [subject], natural action and stable framing, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Camera slightly too high or low

name: High Angle
shortDefinition: Looks down at the subject from above eye level.
whyItMatters: It can make a subject feel smaller, exposed, or easy to inspect.
humanShootHint: Raise the camera enough to make the perspective obvious without flattening everything.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic high-angle shot of [subject], camera looking down, clear composition, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: high-angle shot of [subject], camera looking down, one simple action, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: high-angle shot of [subject], subject moves through frame, gentle hold, 5 seconds

name: Low Angle
shortDefinition: Looks up at the subject from below eye level.
whyItMatters: It can make the subject feel powerful, heroic, dramatic, or imposing.
humanShootHint: Lower the camera and watch for unwanted chin or ceiling distortion.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic low-angle shot of [subject], camera looking upward, dramatic presence, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: low-angle shot of [subject], strong presence, stable camera, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: low-angle shot of [subject], subtle push-in, dramatic natural light, 5 seconds

name: Pan
shortDefinition: Rotates the camera left or right from a fixed position.
whyItMatters: A pan reveals space or follows action without moving the camera base.
humanShootHint: Move slowly, start and end with a short hold, and keep the horizon level.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic pan across [subject], smooth left-to-right camera rotation, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: smooth pan across [subject], one reveal, stable horizon, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: smooth pan across [subject], start hold then reveal then end hold, 5 seconds

name: Tilt
shortDefinition: Rotates the camera up or down from a fixed position.
whyItMatters: A tilt reveals height, scale, or vertical relationships.
humanShootHint: Begin on a clean frame and tilt slowly enough for viewers to read the reveal.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic tilt shot of [subject], smooth vertical camera movement, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: smooth upward tilt revealing [subject], clean start and end frame, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: slow tilt revealing [subject], settle on the final composition, 5 seconds

name: Static Shot
shortDefinition: A shot where the camera stays still.
whyItMatters: Stillness gives clarity and lets performance, design, or action carry the frame.
humanShootHint: Use a tripod, table, wall, or steady hands and let the subject move instead.
aiPromptTemplate: static cinematic shot of [subject], locked camera, one subtle action, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: static shot of [subject], locked camera, subtle subject motion, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: static shot of [subject], action unfolds in a stable frame, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: No movement or visual change at all

name: Handheld Shot
shortDefinition: A shot recorded with the camera held by hand.
whyItMatters: It can feel intimate, immediate, documentary, or energetic.
humanShootHint: Brace your elbows, move with your body, and keep shake intentional.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic handheld shot of [subject], gentle natural camera sway, documentary realism, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: handheld shot of [subject], gentle natural sway, one action, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: handheld shot of [subject], subtle follow movement, realistic camera energy, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Using handheld when the scene needs calm

name: Rack Focus
shortDefinition: Shifts focus from one subject plane to another during the shot.
whyItMatters: It guides attention without cutting.
humanShootHint: Set two focus marks and rehearse the shift before recording.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic rack focus from foreground to [subject], shallow depth of field, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: rack focus from blurred foreground to [subject], soft light, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: rack focus from foreground detail to [subject], hold after focus lands, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Focus lands on the wrong object

name: Shallow Depth of Field
shortDefinition: Only a narrow slice of the image is sharp while the rest blurs.
whyItMatters: It separates the subject and creates a polished cinematic look.
humanShootHint: Use portrait mode, a wider aperture, longer lens, or more distance from the background.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], shallow depth of field, blurred background, soft light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] in shallow depth of field, background softly blurred, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] in shallow depth of field, slow push-in, soft background blur, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Important subject is out of focus

name: Deep Focus
shortDefinition: Foreground, middle ground, and background remain relatively sharp.
whyItMatters: It lets viewers explore layered action and environment.
humanShootHint: Use more light, a smaller aperture, and clear layers in the frame.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic deep focus shot of [subject], foreground and background sharp, layered composition, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: deep focus shot of [subject], clear foreground and background layers, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: deep focus shot of [subject], action visible across multiple layers, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: No clear priority in the layers

name: Rule of Thirds
shortDefinition: Places key subjects near imaginary thirds lines in the frame.
whyItMatters: It creates quick balance and avoids lifeless centering.
humanShootHint: Turn on grid lines and place eyes, horizon, or key detail near a thirds line.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], rule of thirds composition, balanced negative space, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] composed on rule of thirds, balanced frame, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] moves into a rule of thirds composition, gentle hold, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Treating the grid as a law

name: Leading Lines
shortDefinition: Uses lines in the scene to guide the eye toward the subject.
whyItMatters: It makes the frame easier to read and adds depth.
humanShootHint: Position the camera so natural lines point toward the important subject.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], strong leading lines guiding attention, natural light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] framed with leading lines, stable camera, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] revealed along leading lines, slow push-in, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Lines lead away from the subject

name: Key Light
shortDefinition: The main light shaping the subject.
whyItMatters: It defines mood, clarity, and the direction of the image.
humanShootHint: Start with one main light or window and move it until the face or object has shape.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], soft key light from one side, gentle shadow shape, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] lit by a clear soft key light, subtle shadow, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] lit by a soft key light, slight subject movement through shadow, 5 seconds

name: Cut
shortDefinition: An instant transition from one shot to another.
whyItMatters: Cuts control rhythm, meaning, and what information arrives next.
humanShootHint: Shoot clean starts and endings so cuts have breathing room.
aiPromptTemplate: clean hard cut sequence for [subject], clear before-and-after shot contrast, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: two-shot micro sequence of [subject] with a clean cut between actions, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: short sequence of [subject], clean hard cuts from context to detail to hold, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Using transitions to hide weak shots

name: Full Shot
shortDefinition: Shows the full body or full subject from head to toe.
whyItMatters: It makes body language and physical action readable.
humanShootHint: Leave space around the whole subject and avoid cutting at feet or head.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic full shot of [subject], entire body visible, clear action, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: full shot of [subject], complete body movement visible, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: full shot of [subject], one full-body action from start to finish, 5 seconds

name: Medium Close-Up
shortDefinition: Frames roughly chest to head for expression and presence.
whyItMatters: It gives more intimacy than a medium shot without losing context.
humanShootHint: Keep eyes sharp and leave comfortable headroom.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic medium close-up of [subject], expressive face, soft background, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: medium close-up of [subject], subtle expression change, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: medium close-up of [subject], gentle push-in and emotional hold, 5 seconds

name: Two Shot
shortDefinition: Frames two subjects in the same shot.
whyItMatters: It shows relationship, distance, and shared action.
humanShootHint: Balance both subjects and keep their eyelines and body language readable.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic two shot of [subject], two people sharing a clear action, natural light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: two shot of [subject], two people share one small action, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: two shot of [subject], one person reacts as the other speaks, 5 seconds

name: Over-the-Shoulder
shortDefinition: Frames one subject over another subject's shoulder.
whyItMatters: It gives dialogue perspective while keeping relationship context.
humanShootHint: Keep the foreground shoulder soft and preserve consistent screen direction.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic over-the-shoulder shot of [subject], dialogue perspective, shallow depth of field, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: over-the-shoulder shot of [subject], one speaker in focus, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: over-the-shoulder dialogue shot of [subject], speaker reacts and holds eyeline, 5 seconds

name: POV Shot
shortDefinition: Shows what a character or user sees.
whyItMatters: It makes the viewer feel inside the action.
humanShootHint: Place the camera where the eyes or hands would naturally be.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic POV shot of [subject], viewer perspective, natural hand or head movement, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: POV shot of [subject], viewer sees one action directly, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: POV shot of [subject], natural movement toward the action, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Perspective does not match a real viewpoint

name: Insert Shot
shortDefinition: A close shot of an important object, action, or detail.
whyItMatters: It gives the editor useful detail and makes story information clear.
humanShootHint: Shoot the detail cleanly with steady focus and a simple background.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic insert shot of [subject], important detail in focus, soft light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: insert shot of [subject], important detail action, shallow focus, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: insert shot of [subject], detail action begins and settles, soft light, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Shot is too shaky to cut in

name: Cutaway
shortDefinition: A supporting shot that briefly cuts away from the main action.
whyItMatters: It adds context and helps hide edits or time jumps.
humanShootHint: Capture objects, reactions, or environment details connected to the scene.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic cutaway shot for [subject], relevant environmental detail, clean composition, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: cutaway detail for [subject], connected object or environment, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: cutaway for [subject], detail holds long enough to bridge an edit, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Cutaway has no relationship to the scene

name: Reaction Shot
shortDefinition: Shows a subject responding to something that just happened.
whyItMatters: Reactions tell the viewer how to feel about an event.
humanShootHint: Hold long enough after the action so the reaction has time to land.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic reaction shot of [subject], subtle emotional response, soft light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: reaction shot of [subject], subtle expression change, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: reaction shot of [subject], hears news then holds emotional response, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Cutting away before the emotion lands

name: Master Shot
shortDefinition: A wide or medium-wide shot that covers the full scene action.
whyItMatters: It gives the edit a reliable anchor for geography and continuity.
humanShootHint: Record the whole action once before shooting tighter coverage.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic master shot of [subject], full scene action visible, clear blocking, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: master shot of [subject], full action readable, stable frame, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: master shot of [subject], complete action plays in one clear frame, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Framing too tight to understand the scene

name: Reverse Shot
shortDefinition: The opposite angle used to show the other side of a scene or conversation.
whyItMatters: It completes coverage and helps viewers follow who is speaking or reacting.
humanShootHint: Match height, lens feel, and eyeline with the first angle.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic reverse shot of [subject], matching eyeline and lighting, dialogue coverage, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: reverse shot of [subject], matching perspective and eyeline, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: reverse shot of [subject], matched dialogue coverage with subtle reaction, 5 seconds

name: Bird's-Eye View
shortDefinition: Looks straight down from high above.
whyItMatters: It turns a scene into a pattern, map, or striking overview.
humanShootHint: Shoot from directly above and keep lines squared if the graphic look matters.
aiPromptTemplate: bird's-eye view of [subject], camera looking straight down, graphic composition, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: bird's-eye view of [subject], top-down graphic frame, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: bird's-eye view of [subject], small action unfolds in top-down composition, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Not high enough to read as overhead
Flat image with no subject priority

name: Worm's-Eye View
shortDefinition: Looks up from extremely low near ground level.
whyItMatters: It exaggerates height and makes ordinary subjects feel monumental.
humanShootHint: Get the camera very low and watch for distortion that distracts.
aiPromptTemplate: worm's-eye view of [subject], camera near the ground looking up, dramatic scale, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: worm's-eye view of [subject], dramatic upward perspective, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: worm's-eye view of [subject], subject passes above the low camera, 5 seconds

name: Dutch Angle
shortDefinition: Tilts the camera horizon intentionally.
whyItMatters: It creates unease, imbalance, or stylized energy.
humanShootHint: Commit to the tilt and use it only when the mood benefits.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic dutch angle shot of [subject], tilted horizon, tense stylized mood, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: dutch angle shot of [subject], tilted horizon and tense mood, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: dutch angle shot of [subject], subtle movement with intentional imbalance, 5 seconds

name: Dolly In
shortDefinition: Moves the camera physically closer to the subject.
whyItMatters: It adds intention, pressure, or emotional focus.
humanShootHint: Move smoothly toward the subject and keep the final frame composed.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic dolly in toward [subject], slow smooth camera move, emotional focus, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: slow dolly in toward [subject], subject remains centered in focus, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: slow dolly in toward [subject], gentle approach and emotional hold, 5 seconds

name: Dolly Out
shortDefinition: Moves the camera physically away from the subject.
whyItMatters: It can reveal context, isolation, or a wider story world.
humanShootHint: Begin close, move backward smoothly, and protect focus.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic dolly out from [subject], smooth camera retreat revealing environment, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: dolly out from [subject], environment begins to reveal, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: dolly out from [subject], wider context revealed with a clean hold, 5 seconds

name: Tracking Shot
shortDefinition: Moves with the subject through space.
whyItMatters: It keeps action continuous and immersive.
humanShootHint: Match the subject's speed and leave room in the direction of travel.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic tracking shot following [subject], smooth movement through environment, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: tracking shot following [subject], smooth camera movement, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: tracking shot following [subject] through the environment, stable motion, 5 seconds

name: Truck Move
shortDefinition: Moves the camera sideways left or right.
whyItMatters: It reveals layers and follows lateral action.
humanShootHint: Move parallel to the subject and keep the distance consistent.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic truck move past [subject], sideways camera motion, layered parallax, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: sideways truck move past [subject], smooth lateral reveal, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: sideways truck move with [subject], foreground parallax and clean hold, 5 seconds

name: Pedestal Move
shortDefinition: Moves the camera vertically up or down without tilting.
whyItMatters: It changes height while keeping perspective controlled.
humanShootHint: Lift or lower the camera smoothly while keeping the lens angle level.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic pedestal move on [subject], camera rises vertically, level lens, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: vertical pedestal move revealing [subject], level camera, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: slow pedestal move on [subject], vertical reveal with steady framing, 5 seconds

name: Crane/Jib Shot
shortDefinition: Moves the camera through a large rising or sweeping arc.
whyItMatters: It adds scale, elegance, and production value.
humanShootHint: Use the move to reveal meaningful space, not just to look expensive.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic crane shot over [subject], sweeping camera rise, epic scale, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: short crane rise revealing [subject], smooth elegant motion, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: crane shot rising over [subject], environment expands into view, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Move is too complex for the scene

name: Zoom
shortDefinition: Changes focal length to make the subject appear closer or farther.
whyItMatters: It changes framing without physically moving the camera.
humanShootHint: Zoom deliberately and avoid treating it as a replacement for composition.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic zoom on [subject], smooth focal length change, intentional emphasis, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: smooth zoom toward [subject], clear emphasis, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: slow zoom on [subject], controlled framing and final hold, 5 seconds

name: Push-In
shortDefinition: A general move toward the subject, often used like a dolly in.
whyItMatters: It increases attention and emotional pressure.
humanShootHint: Move forward slowly and let the subject grow in importance.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic push-in toward [subject], slow smooth approach, emotional focus, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: slow push-in toward [subject], clean focus and soft light, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: slow push-in toward [subject], gentle movement and final hold, 5 seconds

name: Pull-Back
shortDefinition: A general move away from the subject.
whyItMatters: It reveals surrounding context or creates emotional distance.
humanShootHint: Start with a meaningful close frame and reveal something new as you retreat.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic pull-back from [subject], environment revealed, smooth camera movement, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: pull-back from [subject], new context revealed, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: slow pull-back from [subject], wider story space appears, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Move becomes shaky or too slow

name: Whip Pan
shortDefinition: A very fast pan that creates motion blur.
whyItMatters: It adds energy and can hide a transition between shots.
humanShootHint: Start and end on clear frames so the blur feels intentional.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic whip pan transition around [subject], fast motion blur, energetic cut, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: whip pan from one detail of [subject] to another, fast blur, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: whip pan transition for [subject], clear start and end frames, 5 seconds

name: Orbit Shot
shortDefinition: Moves the camera around the subject in a circular path.
whyItMatters: It shows form, space, and a premium sense of reveal.
humanShootHint: Keep the subject centered and move in a smooth arc.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic orbit shot around [subject], smooth circular camera move, shallow depth of field, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: orbit shot around [subject], smooth partial circle, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: slow orbit around [subject], foreground parallax and soft light, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Orbit is too complex for AI model

name: Foreground
shortDefinition: The part of the frame closest to the camera.
whyItMatters: Foreground adds depth, context, and visual layers.
humanShootHint: Place a soft object or edge near the lens only if it supports the subject.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject] with soft foreground layer, depth and natural framing, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] framed by soft foreground, clear depth, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] with foreground parallax during a slow push-in, 5 seconds

name: Background
shortDefinition: The part of the frame behind the subject.
whyItMatters: Background shapes mood, context, and subject separation.
humanShootHint: Simplify the background or use distance and blur to reduce distraction.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject] with clean background, subject separation, soft light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] against clean background, clear separation, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] with background detail softly revealed, stable camera, 5 seconds

name: Negative Space
shortDefinition: Empty or quiet space around the subject.
whyItMatters: It creates focus, calm, tension, or room for text.
humanShootHint: Give the subject breathing room and keep the empty area visually clean.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject] with strong negative space, minimal background, soft light, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] framed with generous negative space, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] moves into negative space, calm cinematic hold, 5 seconds

name: Continuity
shortDefinition: Keeping action, screen direction, light, and details consistent across shots.
whyItMatters: Continuity helps cuts feel invisible and story flow feel natural.
humanShootHint: Track props, direction, and action positions before changing angle.
aiPromptTemplate: continuity-safe cinematic shot of [subject], matching lighting, direction, and action, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: continuity-safe shot of [subject], matching action across cut, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: two-angle continuity example for [subject], same action and eyeline, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Lighting or direction changes without reason

name: Blocking
shortDefinition: The planned movement and position of people, camera, and objects.
whyItMatters: Blocking makes action understandable before the edit adds polish.
humanShootHint: Walk through the action once and choose positions that read clearly on camera.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject] with clear blocking, simple subject movement, readable space, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] with clear blocking, one subject crosses the frame, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] with simple blocking, subject moves from mark to mark, 5 seconds

name: 180-Degree Rule
shortDefinition: Keeps the camera on one side of an imaginary action line.
whyItMatters: It preserves screen direction so viewers know where everyone is.
humanShootHint: Pick the line between subjects or action and stay on one side unless motivated.
aiPromptTemplate: continuity-safe dialogue shot of [subject], respects 180-degree rule and matching eyelines, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: two-person [subject] setup respecting 180-degree screen direction, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: dialogue coverage for [subject], consistent 180-degree eyelines, 5 seconds

name: Screen Direction
shortDefinition: The perceived left-right direction of movement or looking in the frame.
whyItMatters: Consistent direction makes action easy to follow across cuts.
humanShootHint: Keep subjects moving or looking the same way unless the story intentionally changes it.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], consistent screen direction, clear left-to-right movement, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] moves left to right with clear screen direction, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] continues left-to-right movement across matching shots, 5 seconds

name: Eyeline Match
shortDefinition: Cuts from someone looking to what they appear to be looking at.
whyItMatters: It links attention, emotion, and story information.
humanShootHint: Match the direction and height of the look with the object or person seen next.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic eyeline match for [subject], subject looks then cut to matching object, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: eyeline match of [subject] looking to a related detail, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: eyeline match sequence for [subject], look then object then reaction, 5 seconds

name: Match on Action
shortDefinition: Cuts during the same movement so action feels continuous.
whyItMatters: It hides the cut and makes coverage feel fluid.
humanShootHint: Repeat the same action from multiple angles and cut at the strongest motion point.

previewPrompt3s: match on action of [subject], action continues through a clean cut, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: match on action for [subject], wide to close detail with continuous motion, 5 seconds

name: Shot-Reverse-Shot
shortDefinition: Alternates between two opposing angles, usually in dialogue.

humanShootHint: Shoot matching angles for both sides and keep eyelines consistent.
aiPromptTemplate: shot-reverse-shot dialogue sequence for [subject], matching eyelines, clean coverage, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: shot-reverse-shot of [subject], two matching dialogue angles, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: shot-reverse-shot of [subject], speaker then listener reaction with continuity, 5 seconds

name: J-Cut
shortDefinition: Audio from the next shot begins before the picture changes.
whyItMatters: It smooths transitions and pulls viewers into the next moment.
humanShootHint: Record clean audio handles so sound can lead the picture.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic J-cut sequence for [subject], next audio begins before picture change, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: J-cut concept for [subject], sound leads into next image, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: J-cut sequence for [subject], audio bridge before visual cut, 5 seconds

name: L-Cut
shortDefinition: Audio from the previous shot continues after the picture changes.
whyItMatters: It lets emotion or narration carry across a cut.
humanShootHint: Keep room tone and dialogue tails clean for smoother overlaps.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic L-cut sequence for [subject], previous audio continues over next image, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: L-cut concept for [subject], previous sound carries over new image, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: L-cut sequence for [subject], emotional audio continues across cut, 5 seconds

name: Jump Cut
shortDefinition: A visible cut that jumps forward in time or position.
whyItMatters: It can create speed, comedy, or a direct creator-video rhythm.
humanShootHint: Use jump cuts intentionally and keep the subject position stable if clarity matters.

previewPrompt5s: jump cut sequence of [subject], fast progress through simple action, 5 seconds

name: Match Cut
shortDefinition: Cuts between two visually or conceptually similar images.

name: Montage
shortDefinition: A compressed sequence of shots that builds an idea, mood, or progress.
whyItMatters: It turns many small moments into a fast, memorable story.

name: Fill Light

name: Back Light
shortDefinition: Light placed behind the subject toward the camera.

name: Rim Light

previewPrompt5s: silhouette of [subject], subtle movement against glowing background, 5 seconds

name: Practical Light

name: Focal Length

name: Standard Lens

shortDefinition: A lens with a variable focal length range.

shortDefinition: The range of detail a camera holds from shadows to highlights.

shortDefinition: The camera setting that makes colors look neutral under different light.

whyItMatters: It keeps a sequence coherent before shooting or generating.
humanShootHint: Sketch simple frames for shot size, angle, and action; polish is less important than clarity.
aiPromptTemplate: storyboarded sequence for [subject], clear ordered shots, consistent style, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: storyboard concept for [subject], three clear visual beats, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: storyboard concept for [subject], five ordered beats with consistent style, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Frames do not share a visual language

name: Prompt Template
shortDefinition: A reusable prompt pattern with slots for subject, action, and duration.
whyItMatters: Templates make prompts faster, clearer, and easier to improve.
humanShootHint: Use templates like shot lists: specific enough to guide, flexible enough to reuse.
aiPromptTemplate: prompt template for [subject]: [shot type], one action, camera motion, lighting, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: prompt template demo for [subject], one clear slot-filled shot, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: prompt template demo for [subject], structured shot direction and hold, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Template has too many optional ideas

name: Prompt Pack
shortDefinition: A saved group of prompts for a repeated use case or sequence.
whyItMatters: Packs help creators reuse a visual language across projects.
humanShootHint: Group prompts by story purpose, not just by visual style.
aiPromptTemplate: prompt pack for [subject], ordered shot prompts with consistent style and duration, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: prompt pack preview for [subject], three connected prompts, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: prompt pack preview for [subject], five connected shot prompts, 5 seconds

name: Temporal Consistency
shortDefinition: Visual stability across time within a generated clip.
whyItMatters: It prevents flicker, morphing, and unstable motion.
humanShootHint: Ask for one action and avoid changing the subject, camera, and style at once.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], temporal consistency, stable identity and lighting, one action, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] with stable temporal consistency, one subtle action, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] with stable lighting and identity across motion, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Long prompt fights the reference image

name: Character Consistency
shortDefinition: Keeping the same person or character recognizable across clips.
whyItMatters: It is essential for scenes, series, and story continuity.
humanShootHint: Use reference images, consistent wardrobe, and simple camera changes.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], consistent character identity, same wardrobe and features, one action, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] with consistent character identity, subtle expression change, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] with consistent identity across a slow camera move, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Changing wardrobe or lighting every clip

name: Seed
shortDefinition: A repeatability value that can influence generated variation.
whyItMatters: Seeds can help reproduce or explore related outputs when supported.
humanShootHint: Save seed, prompt, model, and reference data together for repeatability.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], controlled seed variation, same composition and style, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: seed-controlled variation of [subject], same style, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: seed-controlled variation of [subject], similar composition with small motion, 5 seconds

name: Motion Strength
shortDefinition: A control for how much movement the model adds.
whyItMatters: Too much motion can break consistency; too little can feel static.
humanShootHint: Start with low motion for faces and products, then increase only if needed.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], low motion strength, subtle natural movement, stable details, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] with low motion strength, subtle stable movement, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] with controlled motion strength and preserved details, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Expecting one setting to fit every subject

name: Negative Prompt
shortDefinition: Instructions describing what the model should avoid.
whyItMatters: It can reduce unwanted artifacts in workflows that support it.
humanShootHint: Prefer positive shot direction first; use negatives only for recurring problems.
aiPromptTemplate: cinematic [subject], clear positive prompt, avoid extra limbs, text, logos, flicker, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: [subject] generated with concise negative constraints, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: [subject] with stable details and avoided artifacts, 5 seconds
commonMistakes: Negative list is longer than the prompt

name: Timestamp Prompting
shortDefinition: Prompting events or changes at specific times in a clip.
whyItMatters: It makes short clips easier to direct and review.
humanShootHint: Keep timing simple: settle, action, hold.
aiPromptTemplate: timestamped prompt for [subject], 0s settle, 1s action begins, final second hold, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: timestamped [subject], settle then one action then hold, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: timestamped [subject], 0.7s establish, 2.6s action, 1.7s hold, 5 seconds

name: Upscaling/Export
shortDefinition: Preparing generated clips at the right resolution, format, and quality.
whyItMatters: Good export choices protect final quality and platform fit.
humanShootHint: Track source resolution, aspect ratio, frame rate, and compression settings.
aiPromptTemplate: export-ready cinematic [subject], clean detail, platform-safe aspect ratio, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: export-ready [subject], clean detail and stable frame, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: export-ready [subject], clean motion and platform-safe composition, 5 seconds

name: Provenance Metadata
shortDefinition: Records describing where an asset came from and how it was made.
whyItMatters: It supports trust, rights review, and repeatable generation.
humanShootHint: Save prompt, model, provider, date, source assets, and rights notes.
aiPromptTemplate: provenance-ready [subject], metadata captured for prompt, model, provider, source assets, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: provenance-ready [subject], metadata concept, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: provenance-ready [subject], prompt and source tracking visible in workflow, 5 seconds

name: Watermark
shortDefinition: A visible or invisible marker identifying content source or ownership.
whyItMatters: It can support attribution, disclosure, or platform policy.
humanShootHint: Keep visible marks tasteful and do not remove marks you are required to keep.
aiPromptTemplate: watermark-aware [subject], clean composition with provenance and attribution preserved, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: watermark-aware preview of [subject], attribution-safe frame, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: watermark-aware preview of [subject], clean frame and rights-safe metadata, 5 seconds

name: C2PA
shortDefinition: An open standard for content provenance and authenticity metadata.
whyItMatters: It helps viewers and platforms understand how media was created.
humanShootHint: Store C2PA data when providers return it and preserve it during export when possible.
aiPromptTemplate: C2PA-ready cinematic [subject], provenance metadata preserved, rights-safe generation, [duration]
previewPrompt3s: C2PA-ready preview of [subject], provenance concept, 3 seconds
previewPrompt5s: C2PA-ready preview of [subject], provenance-safe workflow and final hold, 5 seconds
